summary: Full backend + frontend regression of School Management System. Backend: 22/22 pytest tests passed including auth (login/wrong-pw/me/logout/cookies), dashboard stats, institute GET/PUT (role-enforced), classes CRUD with role enforcement (teacher 403 on DELETE, admin 200), subjects CRUD, students list/search/create with duplicate-reg 400, employees CRUD, fees list/bulk-generate/pay/report, attendance mark/get/report, and messaging send returning status=skipped when Twilio creds blank (no 500). Frontend: admin login -> dashboard KPI cards render, all 10 sidebar nav links work, Classes create works (toast 'Class created'), Students search + create work, Fees page KPI cards visible & generate-invoices dialog opens, Attendance student/employee tab switching + save button visible, Messaging send triggers 'skipped' toast, Reports fee/attendance tab switching works, Settings save institute works, Logout returns to login.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 979 lines — consider splitting into routers/models modules per feature for maintainability (auth, students, fees, attendance, messages).
set_auth_cookies uses secure=False and samesite='lax'. For production over HTTPS this should be secure=True with samesite='none' (since FE and BE are different subdomains).
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' but allow_credentials=True with wildcard origins is non-standard and rejected by some browsers. Recommend explicit origin list (current preview URL).
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login — playbook requirement.
JWT_SECRET committed in .env is fine for preview but should be rotated for production.

PUT endpoints for classes/subjects/students/employees use the same Pydantic IN model which forces all fields (data.model_dump()) — partial updates not supported and previously-set fields could be overwritten with defaults.
Fee invoice schema has no DB-level uniqueness on (student_id, month, year); bulk-generate avoids dupes but a direct POST to /api/fees/invoices does not check.
register endpoint is publicly accessible and lets anyone create users with any role (including admin) — privilege escalation risk.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds on startup. Test data created during run (TEST_/UI_TEST_ prefixes, 2099 fee invoices, 2099-01-15 attendance) was cleaned up after tests via mongosh.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py for regression. Seed data is idempotent. Cookies are httpOnly so requests.Session() must be used (no manual Bearer header needed). Twilio env intentionally blank — send returns status=skipped (not failed). Bulk-generate uses query params not JSON body.
